sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ النَّظَامَ وَالتَّرْتِيبَ يُسَاعِدَانِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da red i organiziranost pomažu u poslu.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that order and organisation help in work.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَكُونُ الْأَشْيَاءُ مُرَتَّبَةً يَسْهُلُ إِيجَادُهَا.
sentences.translation: Kada su stvari poredane, lakše ih je pronaći.
sentences.translationEn: When things are tidy they are easy to find.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ أَنْ أُرَتِّبَ غُرْفَتِي كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se svako jutro pospremiti svoju sobu.
sentences.translationEn: I try to tidy my room every morning.

sentences.arabic: الشَّخْصُ الْمُنَظَّمُ يُنْجِزُ كَثِيرًا فِي وَقْتٍ قَصِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Organizirana osoba postigne puno u kratkom vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: An organised person achieves a lot in a short time.
